headline.text: Finding 100%-plus gold stock winners with VectorVest... And never fear another 'Flash Crash' again.
headline.subheadline: VectorVest protects your profits BEFORE the market takes a dive. And with its market timing, you'll be ready when the market goes back up!

schema_analysis.expectation_violated: Audience expects stock picking to be complex, risky, requiring expert knowledge or lucky guesses. This promises mathematical certainty, automated stock analysis, and market-timing that prevents losses before they happen.
schema_analysis.whitespace_territory: Mathematical certainty in stock selection (vs. analyst opinions, gut feelings, TV pundits). Automated 'point, click, profit' system (vs. hours of research). Market timing that PREVENTS losses (vs. hoping to time the bottom).

lead.full_text:
Dear Profit-seeking Investor,

Imagine rebalancing your portfolio just once every 6 months over the past 11 years and earning a 737.93% return.

Well, stop imagining. That's exactly what you would have achieved using VectorVest U.S. between 1/2/1996 and the day we went to press. And that was using the most conservative of the 9 strategies detailed in this report.

That means your investment of $100,000 would have grown to a whopping $837,930.28!

All you need is a 20-stock portfolio selected by VectorVest's Value, Safety and Timing indicator (VST) and about 20 seconds to spare in January and July.

On the first trading day in January, you buy the top 20 stocks identified by VectorVest's VST indicator. Hold them till July. Then you simply sell the stocks that are no longer in the top 20 and replace them with the stocks that are. It's that simple!

From May 2005 to May 2006, this incredibly easy investment strategy raked in a profit of 88.65%.

schema_analysis.expectation_violated: Opens with impossible-sounding simplicity (20 seconds twice a year = 737% return). 'Stop imagining' creates tension-resolution: it sounds too good to be true BUT it's documented fact. Demolishes belief that great returns require constant monitoring.
schema_analysis.whitespace_territory: Twice-yearly 20-second rebalancing vs. daily stock watching. Mathematical indicators (VST) vs. analyst opinions. Proven historical track record vs. future predictions.

three_part_structure.what_they_think: Stock market success requires expert knowledge, constant attention, insider information, or lucky timing. You need to watch the market daily, read analyst reports, understand complex financials, or pay expensive brokers to make decisions for you. And even then, you're gambling because nobody can predict the market.
three_part_structure.what_it_really_is: Stock prices are controlled by 3 mathematical variables: Relative Value, Relative Safety, and Relative Timing. These can be calculated with 'flawless mathematical logic' using 25+ years of algorithmic formulas. The market's turning points can be CONFIRMED (not predicted) using the Vector Vest Composite and Market Timing Indicator. Success isn't about predicting - it's about having a system that CONFIRMS trends and identifies undervalued stocks mathematically.
three_part_structure.why_nothing_worked: You've been relying on emotion, hunches, TV pundits, and broker tips - all driven by emotion and opinion, not math. You couldn't identify true market tops/bottoms without guessing. You bought overvalued 'hot tips' from analysts instead of mathematically undervalued gems. You had no systematic way to know WHEN to exit before crashes. You were investing on hope, not mathematical certainty.

narrative_reorganization.self_blame_removal: You weren't bad at investing - you were using the wrong tools. Brokers, analysts, and TV pundits are all driven by emotion and opinion, not mathematics. The Wall Street establishment WANTS you to think investing requires their expertise. But math doesn't lie - and you didn't have access to the mathematical formulas that really control stock prices until now.
narrative_reorganization.coherence_creation: Connects: losses in market crashes (2008, Flash Crash) + stocks that looked good but tanked + analyst recommendations that failed + feeling paralyzed about when to buy/sell + sleepless nights worrying about nest egg + having to 'hope' brokers are right → all explained by lack of mathematical certainty about value, safety, and timing.
narrative_reorganization.new_self_concept: Not a gambling amateur who needs Wall Street experts. Someone who now has access to the PhD-level mathematical formulas that Wall Street Journal contest winners use. You can make decisions in 20 seconds that beat the 'pros' because you have mathematical certainty, not emotional guesswork.

mechanism.name: VST (Value, Safety, Timing) Tri-Variable Mathematical Analysis
mechanism.simplified_explanation: Dr. Di Liddo (MIT mathematician, PhD from Case Western Reserve) discovered after 25+ years of research that ALL factors influencing stock prices can be reduced to 3 mathematical variables: Relative Value (RV), Relative Safety (RS), and Relative Timing (RT). Each rated 0.00 to 2.00. VectorVest instantly analyzes 8,000+ stocks daily using these formulas. RV finds undervalued gems (not just cheap stocks). RS measures true risk (price volatility, debt-to-equity, consistency). RT signals when to enter/exit (uptrend above 1.00, downtrend below). Combined into VST score, it identifies winning stocks mathematically - point, click, profit.

fssit_candidates.statement: At last, no more sleepless nights worrying whether or not your nest egg is safe. No more having to rely on brokers and TV pundits for stock tips. And no more concerns about whether you'll have enough money when you retire.
fssit_candidates.past_explaining_power: Names the specific anxieties they've been living with: sleepless nights, forced dependence on 'experts', retirement fear. Validates these as rational responses to not having mathematical certainty.

fssit_candidates.statement: Thanks for saving me from myself - I am so excited to see the markets doing exactly what your site has been telling me. I tightened my stops last week and let my portfolio extinguish itself as you suggested. Now I look at the market and the stocks that I was 'stopped' out of are continuing to free fall.
fssit_candidates.past_explaining_power: Testimonial validates the terror of emotional trading ('saving me from myself'). They would have held losing positions out of hope/fear. The system provided the discipline and confidence to exit BEFORE the crash.

fssit_candidates.statement: I don�t believe in buying stocks that are going down in price. But sometimes the market is very choppy. Week after week, the market swings back and forth making entry and exit points difficult to find. That's when the pros make money by 'buying on the dips.' But how do you know?
fssit_candidates.past_explaining_power: Validates the paralysis: you KNOW the principle (don't catch a falling knife, buy the dips) but can't execute because you don't know when the 'dip' is over. The pros have tools you didn't - until now.

fssit_candidates.statement: In a world of financial hucksters, you guys are the real-deal.
fssit_candidates.past_explaining_power: Names the industry cynicism they've developed after being burned. They've been pitched scams before. This validates their skepticism while positioning VectorVest as the exception.

fssit_candidates.statement: VectorVest prevents me from buying overvalued stocks. It is amazing how many of those are hyped by other analysts. I have passed on many stocks that were recommended by other analysts but that didn't pass VectorVest muster and I missed out only on big losses.
fssit_candidates.past_explaining_power: Explains past losses: the 'hot tips' from analysts were mathematically overvalued. They weren't unlucky or bad at picking - the analysts were WRONG. VectorVest's math revealed the truth.

rsf_analysis.fssit_placement_pattern: Concentrated in testimonials (peer validation of shared struggles). Lighter in mechanism explanation (focused on math proof). Strategic placement in strategy sections to validate specific pain points (timing paralysis, overvalued tips).

key_insights.big_idea: Stock market success isn't about expert knowledge, insider tips, or lucky timing - it's about MATHEMATICS. After 25+ years of research, MIT mathematician Dr. Di Liddo reduced all stock price factors to 3 mathematical variables (Value, Safety, Timing) calculated with flawless logic. VectorVest gives you PhD-level mathematical certainty in 20 seconds that beats Wall Street pros.
key_insights.primary_enemy: Emotion-driven investing: brokers pushing commissions, TV pundits making guesses, analysts hyping overvalued stocks, your own fear/greed causing you to buy high and sell low
key_insights.secondary_enemy: The Wall Street establishment that wants you to believe investing requires their 'expertise' and wants to keep you dependent on their opinions instead of mathematical certainty
key_insights.mechanism_uniqueness: Only system built on 30 years of MIT-level mathematical formulas that reduce ALL stock price factors to 3 quantified variables (0.00-2.00 scale). Not predictions or opinions - mathematical CONFIRMATION of trends. Instantly analyzes 8,000+ stocks vs. human analysts covering dozens.
key_insights.emotional_core: Liberation from sleepless nights, anxiety, and dependence on 'experts'. Empowerment through mathematical certainty. Revenge against the Wall Street establishment that kept these tools hidden. Confidence to make decisions in seconds that beat the pros.
copy_techniques: Mathematical authority positioning (PhD, MIT, Case Western, 30 years)
Testimonials with specific dollar amounts and percentages
David vs. Goliath (you with math vs. Wall Street with opinions)
